sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! Clicking on the purple dot at (51, 15) - the TOP purple dot - caused the right panel to change! Looking at the image:
- The right panel now has WHITE squares at the TOP and BOTTOM positions (row 50 and row 60)
- The LEFT and RIGHT positions are still gray
- The center is still gray
- The corners are still gray
So clicking on the TOP purple dot "activated" the top and bottom white squares in the right panel! This is a major discovery.
The left panel has 4 purple dots at the 4 tips of the cross. Clicking on each one probably "activates" the corresponding white square(s) in the right panel.
Let me think about the mapping:
- Top purple dot (51, 15) → activated top and bottom white squares in right panel
Wait, that's 2 squares activated by 1 click. Let me look more carefully.
Looking at the image, I see white squares at:
- Top-middle (row 50, col 30)
- Bottom-middle (row 60, col 30)
So clicking on the top purple dot activated BOTH the top AND bottom squares. This is interesting.
Let me try clicking on the other purple dots to see what they activate.
- Left purple dot (54, 12) → might activate left square
- Right purple dot (54, 18) → might activate right square
- Bottom purple dot (57, 15) → might activate top and bottom squares again (or deactivate them)
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider. The top purple dot is at the top of the cross in the left panel. When I clicked it, it activated the top and bottom squares in the right panel. Maybe each purple dot activates the squares in the same direction?
- Top purple dot → activates top square (and maybe bottom too, since it's on the same vertical axis)
- Left purple dot → activates left square (and maybe right too)
- Right purple dot → activates right square (and maybe left too)
- Bottom purple dot → activates bottom square (and maybe top too)
Or maybe:
- Top purple dot → activates top AND bottom (vertical axis)
- Left purple dot → activates left AND right (horizontal axis)
- Right purple dot → activates right AND left (horizontal axis)
- Bottom purple dot → activates bottom AND top (vertical axis)
Let me test by clicking on the left purple dot.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click on the left purple dot to see what it activates
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 12}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
